title: Filipino-Style Pancit with Guanciale and Rich Sauce
description: A delicious and savory pancit dish made with guanciale, rich sauce, and a hint of Filipino flavors.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large wok or frying pan over medium heat.
Add the guanciale and cook until crispy, about 2-3 minutes.
Remove the guanciale from the pan and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the pan.
Add the garlic, onion, and ginger and stir-fry until the onion is translucent.
Add the pancit and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the rich sauce and stir-fry for another minute.
Return the guanciale to the pan and stir-fry for another minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
